top_tweets.text:
Introducing GPT-5.5

A new class of intelligence for real work and powering agents, built to understand complex goals, use tools, check its work, and carry more tasks through to completion. It marks a new way of getting computer work done.

Now available in ChatGPT and Codex. https://t.co/rPLTk99ZH5
top_tweets.author: OpenAI
top_tweets.name: OpenAI
top_tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.5，強調新一代智能可理解複雜目標、使用工具、自我檢查並完成更多任務，現已在 ChatGPT 與 Codex 上線。

top_tweets.text: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT—shared agents that can handle complex tasks and long-running workflows across tools and teams. https://t.co/eHplfXCWlk
top_tweets.author: OpenAI
top_tweets.name: OpenAI
top_tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT workspace agents，可跨工具與團隊處理複雜任務與長時間工作流程。

top_tweets.text:
Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem on the three issues we found.

All are fixed in v2.1.116+ and we’ve reset usage limits for all subscribers.
top_tweets.author: ClaudeDevs
top_tweets.name: ClaudeDevs
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Code 團隊公開過去一個月品質問題的事後報告，三個問題已在 v2.1.116+ 修復，並重置所有訂戶使用額度。

top_tweets.text: Claude can now connect to more of the apps you use outside of work, including @Tripadvisor, @bookingcom, @resy, @Instacart, @Spotify, @audible_com, @AllTrails, @thumbtack, Intuit @turbotax, and more. https://t.co/SmQcIdwDWi
top_tweets.author: claudeai
top_tweets.name: Claude
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude 現可連接更多生活類應用，包括 Tripadvisor、Booking.com、Resy、Instacart、Spotify、Audible 等第三方服務。

top_tweets.text:
Interactive charts and diagrams are now in Claude Cowork.

Available in beta on all paid plans.
top_tweets.author: claudeai
top_tweets.name: Claude
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Cowork 現支援互動式圖表與圖解功能，已在所有付費方案的 beta 版開放。引用推文指出此功能已在免費版開放。

context.quoted_text:
Claude can now build interactive charts and diagrams, directly in the chat.

Available today in beta on all plans, including free.

Try it out: http://claude.ai

top_tweets.text:
Memory on Claude Managed Agents is now in public beta.

Your agents can now learn from every session, using an intelligence-optimized memory layer that balances performance with flexibility. https://t.co/P7GjOYPqCz
top_tweets.author: claudeai
top_tweets.name: Claude
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Managed Agents 的記憶功能進入公開 beta，Agent 可從每次對話學習，使用智能優化的記憶層平衡效能與彈性。

top_tweets.text:
New blog: Building agents that reach production systems with MCP.

When should agents use direct APIs vs CLIs vs MCP? Plus patterns for building MCP servers, context-efficient clients and pairing MCP with skills.

https://t.co/JEogw5vWly
top_tweets.author: ClaudeDevs
top_tweets.name: ClaudeDevs
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude 團隊發布如何用 MCP 建構可達生產系統的 Agent 技術文章，探討何時使用 API/CLI/MCP，以及建構 MCP server 的模式。

top_tweets.text:
GPT-5.5 is here.

It’s our smartest frontier model yet, introducing a new class of intelligence for agentic coding, computer use, knowledge work, and scientific research.

Rolling out in ChatGPT and Codex today. API is coming soon. https://t.co/KS3Q0hB4bG
top_tweets.author: OpenAIDevs
top_tweets.name: OpenAI Developers
top_tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 GPT-5.5 是目前最聰明的前沿模型，針對 agentic coding、電腦操作、知識工作與科學研究帶來新一級智能，已在 ChatGPT 與 Codex 上線。

top_tweets.text:
With GPT-5.5, Codex now gets more of the job done across the browser, files, docs, and your computer.

We've expanded browser use so Codex can interact with web apps, and test flows, click through pages, capture screenshots, and iterate on what it sees until it completes the https://t.co/rUguNHIcIB
top_tweets.author: OpenAIDevs
top_tweets.name: OpenAI Developers
top_tweets.summary_zh: GPT-5.5 讓 Codex 能跨瀏覽器、檔案、文件與電腦完成更多工作，擴展瀏覽器操作能力，可與網頁應用互動、測試流程、截圖並迭代至完成。

top_tweets.text:
Claude Code + ChatGPT Images 2.0 is f*cking cracked 🤯

I rebuilt my static ad system inside Claude Code on the new ChatGPT Images 2.0 model.

One brand name + one URL = 40 production-ready static ads.

All inside Claude Code.

Perfect for DTC brands and agencies who need https://t.co/n4xPKDnb5I
top_tweets.author: mikefutia
top_tweets.name: Mike Futia
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者用 Claude Code + ChatGPT Images 2.0 重建靜態廣告系統，只需品牌名稱與 URL 即可產生 40 組生產級靜態廣告，適合 DTC 品牌與代理商。

top_tweets.text:
This entire interface is an SVG made with Deep Think mode in Gemini.

See how to make your own complex animations 👇 https://t.co/lcMYpAU38T
top_tweets.author: GeminiApp
top_tweets.name: Google Gemini
top_tweets.summary_zh: Gemini Deep Think 模式可生成整套複雜 SVG 動畫介面，展示如何使用 AI 製作自訂動畫效果。

top_tweets.text: I'm a manager at @OpenAI, but with GPT-5.5 I'm a more effective IC than I've ever been. I can now write CUDA kernels like a pro. I can rely on it to run my research experiments. And we know how to make it much more powerful from here. https://t.co/6n2uAYCtTf
top_tweets.author: polynoamial
top_tweets.name: Noam Brown
top_tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI 經理分享 GPT-5.5 讓他作為 IC 比以往更有效率，能像專家一樣寫 CUDA kernel、執行研究實驗，且團隊知道如何讓它更強大。

top_tweets.text:
It's only been just over 24 hours since OpenAI dropped ChatGPT Images 2.0.

And people can't stop getting creative with it.

10 wild examples:
top_tweets.author: minchoi
top_tweets.name: Min Choi
top_tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Images 2.0 後 24 小時內，使用者已創作大量創意案例，文章整理十個令人驚豔的應用實例。

top_tweets.text:
80% of US adults who report using Claude in the previous week live in households earning $100,000 or more a year, compared to 37% of Meta AI users.

Other major providers cluster in a relatively narrow band, with 56–64% of users in $100,000+ households. https://t.co/4PJnbqJB8X
top_tweets.author: EpochAIResearch
top_tweets.name: Epoch AI
top_tweets.summary_zh: 調查顯示 80% 上週使用 Claude 的美國成人來自年收入 10 萬美元以上家庭，Meta AI 僅 37%，其他主要供應商則在 56-64% 之間。

top_tweets.text:
Google has crawled every GitHub repo, every Stack Overflow answer, every documentation page ever written

And Gemini still sucks at coding, Explain!!
top_tweets.author: Star_Knight12
top_tweets.name: Prasenjit
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者質疑 Google 爬遍所有 GitHub repo、Stack Overflow 解答與文件後，Gemini 程式碼能力仍不佳的原因。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Speakmac
top_products.author: Kiran Jd
top_products.tagline: Private voice typing for Mac that works anywhere
top_products.summary_zh: Mac 平台的私密語音輸入工具，可在任何應用程式中使用。適合需要在本機進行語音轉文字的使用者。

top_products.title: Talk to Review
top_products.author: Jack Butcher
top_products.summary_zh: 透過語音快速生成評論的工具，10 秒內即可完成真實評論。適合需要快速撰寫產品或服務評價的使用者。

top_products.title: Blink AI CFO
top_products.author: Garry Tan
top_products.tagline: AI CFO that autonomously trades stocks and options via Slack
top_products.summary_zh: 透過 Slack 自主執行股票與選擇權交易的 AI 財務長工具，為使用者提供自動化投資決策與執行服務。

top_products.title: Fabric CLI
top_products.author: johnny makes ⚡️
top_products.tagline: Make notes, tasks, and search, directly from the terminal.
top_products.summary_zh: 在終端機直接建立筆記、任務與搜尋的命令列工具。適合習慣使用終端機作業的開發者與進階使用者。

top_products.title: Foil AI Code Security
top_products.author: Vito Rallo
top_products.tagline: AI code security review that runs entirely on your Mac
top_products.summary_zh: 完全在 Mac 本機運行的 AI 程式碼安全審查工具，無需將程式碼上傳至雲端即可進行安全檢測。

top_products.title: Agent Context
top_products.author: gareth marland
top_products.tagline: Attach reference projects for AI coding tools
top_products.summary_zh: 為 AI 編程工具附加參考專案的輔助工具，幫助 AI 更準確理解專案脈絡與編碼需求。
